---
id: sendtypingindicator
title: "Creates a typing indicator for a conversation."
description: " Sends a typing indicator to the Chalet room associated with the given conversation. Requires an authorType of either 'user' or 'bot' to determine the identity used when sending the indicator."
sidebar_label: "Creates a typing indicator for a conversation."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: actions-events/reference/contact-center-chat-gateway
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Creates a typing indicator for a conversation."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/chat-gateway/v1/conversations/{conversationId}/typing"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



 Sends a typing indicator to the Chalet room associated with the given conversation. Requires an authorType of either 'user' or 'bot' to determine the identity used when sending the indicator.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"conversationId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"Conversation identifier.","schema":{"type":"string","format":"string","example":"125"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Defines the typing request payload.","required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["authorType"],"properties":{"authorType":{"type":"string","enum":["bot","user"],"example":"bot","description":"The author type typing the message."}}}],"title":"TypingRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"204":{"description":"No Content"},"400":{"description":"Contains a descriptive response for a bad request that is due to data customerId=aaaa"}}},"title":"ForbiddenViolationProblem"}}}},"404":{"description":"Contains a descriptive >
